faqs.question: What are the career options available after completing MBA from Lords University?
faqs.answer:
The Master in Business Administration (MBA) is a professional post-graduate degree that offers great career opportunities across various industries. Students can check some of the career options available after completing MBA from Lords University with avaegare package below:
Job Profiles Description Average Salary (in INR)
Business Analyst A Business Analyst is a professional who works within an organisation to analyze, understand, and document the business processes and systems.  9.5 LPA
Investment Banker An Investment Banker is a finance professional who works within an investment bank or a financial institution, specializing in providing financial advisory services and raising capital for corporations, governments, and other entities.  5 LPA
Chief Financial Officer The CFO is a high-level executive responsible for managing an organization's financial actions, strategies, and operations.  47.1 LPA
Product Manager A Product Manager is a professional responsible for overseeing the development, strategy, and success of a product throughout its lifecycle.  24.7 LPA
Management Consulting Management consulting involves providing advisory services to organizations to improve their performance, solve problems, and achieve their goals.  7 LPA
Check best MBA colleges in Rajasthan here.

faqs.question: Can I get admission at Lords University without an entrance exam?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can admission at Lords University without an entrance exam for most of the programmes offered. Lords University accepts admissions to its UG and PG programmes such as BBA, BCA, MCA, BPT, MCom, MBA and more are completely based on merit obtained by the students in qualifying exams. However, for the PhD programme, the applicants need to clear the PhD entrance test. For further details, candidates can visit the official website of Lords University or visit the campus office personally.

faqs.question: How can I apply for admission to Lords University, Alwar?
faqs.answer: The mode of Lords University course admissions is online. Admission to various courses is based on merit and entrance examination scores. The accepted entrance exams are GPAT,  UGC NET, and others. Candidates willing to get admission must first visit the official website of the university. Then click on the Apply Now tab. Select the required course and then pay the application fee. Fill out and submit the application form with required information.

college_info.intro:
Lords University popular programmes are MBA and BTech. MBA and BTech students are placed in top companies at top positions such as Signature Sattva, India First Life, Niva, Talent Serve, Liv Easy, and others. MBA programme is crafted to provide an immersive learning experience to students, combining theoretical knowledge with practical applications. MBA students can go for Managerial positions, Leadership roles, and others. The following are the USPs of joining Lords University flagship courses:
Entrepreneurial Development
Mentorship Programmes

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Lords University offers PG, UG, and other courses to students. These courses are provided across the Law, Arts, Education, and various other streams. At the UG level, the university offers BBA, BCA, BTech, BPT, and other courses. At the PG level, the university offers MCom, MBA, MCA, MA, MPT, and other courses. Below mentioned are some of the courses and their respective eligibility and Lords College Alwar fees:

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates are required to meet the basic eligibility criteria for admission to BA LLB (Hons). The basic eligibility for BA LLB (Hons)  is to pass Class 10 and Class 12 with 60% aggreagte from a recognised board. After fulfilling the eligibility criteria candidates need to fill out the application form online or offline for admission.

faqs.answer: A:    It is a two-year course at the PG level. The selection criteria at Lords University is meirt-based. It is a specialised course which provides the quickest entry to the Management industry. It also caters for the need of Management-enabled services, banks,   and various requirements of the public and private sector.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The college is very good in all aspects, and facilities are very supportive.

review_content.Placements: In my course, around 65-70 percent of students got placed through campus placement. The highest package offered is around 6 LPA. The average package is about 3 LPA. The lowest package is around 1.8-2 LPA. Some students also opt for higher studies or off-campus jobs.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is very good and well-maintained. Classrooms are spacious, clean, and equipped with proper seating. Along with fans and smart boards. Projectors were required. Campus has good Wi-Fi connectivity. Computer labs are updated with the necessary software for practical learning. The library is well stocked with textbooks, reference books, and journals. It provides a peaceful study environment.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (In collaboration with IBM) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the college and recommend others to take admission.

review_content.Placements: I am in the first year, so I can't say that about much of the placement. But according to the senior's experience that they share with me, almost 70-80 percent of the students got an internship and placement. There are also big companies that give students placement.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are multiple Wi Fi networks in the college on each campus. The internet speed is fast. The food quality in the canteen is nice. The surroundings are also clean and neat. You can play multiple sports and games in the college ground.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2030
reviews_list.review_title: The college is overall good, but it can also add clinical exposure for students.

review_content.Placements: 80-85 percent of students get placed. The highest salary package offered ranges from 80-90 LPA, and the average package offered ranges from 10-15 LPA. The lowest package offered ranges from 5-6 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Solanki Hospital, Harish Hospital, Sania Hospital, Geetanjali Hospital, and Rajeev Gandhi Hospital. All students got internships, and a few students got internships in government hospitals. Top roles offered are cardio PT, ortho PT, neuro PT, sports therapist, clinical therapy, business, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has air-conditioned classrooms, installed Wi-Fi in the entire college, well-equipped labs, and a good library with many resources related to every course. It has hygienic and good food. The menu has diverse options. The canteen is also maintained with hygiene. Medical facilities are available. Sports and games are also available with a volleyball group or a field for entertainment.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2030
reviews_list.review_title: It provides excellent faculty members and placements in 2024.

review_content.Placements: 80-85 percent of students from my batch got successfully placed through campus recruitment. The highest salary package offered ranges from 20-80 LPA, and the lowest package offered ranges from 3-4 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Rajeev Gandhi Government Hospital, Harish Hospital, Saniya Hospital and Solanki Hospital. All students got internships and a few students got internships in government hospitals. Top roles offered are cardio PT, gynecologist PT, ortho PT, neuro PT, sports PT, clinical therapy and business. Placements are 100 percent here.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2030
reviews_list.review_title: It is a very good college.

review_content.Placements: 80-85 percent of students get placed. The highest salary package offered ranges from 80-90 LPA, and the average package offered ranges from 6-7 LPA. The lowest package offered ranges from 3-4 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Rajeev Gandhi Government Hospital, Solanki Hospital, Harish Hospital, Sania Hospital, and Geetanjali Hospital. All students got internships, and a few students got internships in government hospitals. Top roles offered are cardio PT, gynecologist PT, ortho PT, neuro PT, sports therapist, clinical therapy, business, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (In collaboration with IBM) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: A decent choice for career-oriented students.

review_content.Placements: Around 20-30% of students from my course were placed during campus placements. The highest package offered was around 3-4 LPA. The college provides very less internships to find itself. Some of the major companies that visited for placements included TCS, Wipro. Around 60% of students from my course got internships through personal efforts.
review_content.Infrastructure: We do have 2 labs, 1 common library, and 2 other labs from other departments. The classrooms are normal, only fans, no AC, hostel is also okayish. The food quality is good, currently the canteen is closed, but sports are available here like volleyball, cricket, and badminton.

answer.text: Lords University admission process begins with registration for a course. Once the registration is over, candidates are shortlisted based on their merit in the last qualifying exam. The university called candidates for documents verification for the final seat allotment. Selected candidates need to pay the admission fee to grab the seat.

answer.text: No, the registration fee for Lords University admissions to any of its offered programmes is non-refundable. According to the official website of the university, candidates will not be refunded the registration fee, however, after a certain deduction from the tuition fee, the rest will be duly returned only if the classes have not already begun.

review_summary.college_name: Lords University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The college is very good in all aspects, and facilities are very supportive.

content.Placements: In my course, around 65-70 percent of students got placed through campus placement. The highest package offered is around 6 LPA. The average package is about 3 LPA. The lowest package is around 1.8-2 LPA. Some students also opt for higher studies or off-campus jobs.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is very good and well-maintained. Classrooms are spacious, clean, and equipped with proper seating. Along with fans and smart boards. Projectors were required. Campus has good Wi-Fi connectivity. Computer labs are updated with the necessary software for practical learning. The library is well stocked with textbooks, reference books, and journals. It provides a peaceful study environment.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Application (In collaboration with IBM) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college and recommend others to take admission.

content.Placements: I am in the first year, so I can't say that about much of the placement. But according to the senior's experience that they share with me, almost 70-80 percent of the students got an internship and placement. There are also big companies that give students placement.
content.Infrastructure: There are multiple Wi Fi networks in the college on each campus. The internet speed is fast. The food quality in the canteen is nice. The surroundings are also clean and neat. You can play multiple sports and games in the college ground.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: The college is overall good, but it can also add clinical exposure for students.

content.Placements: 80-85 percent of students get placed. The highest salary package offered ranges from 80-90 LPA, and the average package offered ranges from 10-15 LPA. The lowest package offered ranges from 5-6 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Solanki Hospital, Harish Hospital, Sania Hospital, Geetanjali Hospital, and Rajeev Gandhi Hospital. All students got internships, and a few students got internships in government hospitals. Top roles offered are cardio PT, ortho PT, neuro PT, sports therapist, clinical therapy, business, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has air-conditioned classrooms, installed Wi-Fi in the entire college, well-equipped labs, and a good library with many resources related to every course. It has hygienic and good food. The menu has diverse options. The canteen is also maintained with hygiene. Medical facilities are available. Sports and games are also available with a volleyball group or a field for entertainment.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: It provides excellent faculty members and placements in 2024.

content.Placements: 80-85 percent of students from my batch got successfully placed through campus recruitment. The highest salary package offered ranges from 20-80 LPA, and the lowest package offered ranges from 3-4 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Rajeev Gandhi Government Hospital, Harish Hospital, Saniya Hospital and Solanki Hospital. All students got internships and a few students got internships in government hospitals. Top roles offered are cardio PT, gynecologist PT, ortho PT, neuro PT, sports PT, clinical therapy and business. Placements are 100 percent here.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2030
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college.

content.Placements: 80-85 percent of students get placed. The highest salary package offered ranges from 80-90 LPA, and the average package offered ranges from 6-7 LPA. The lowest package offered ranges from 3-4 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Rajeev Gandhi Government Hospital, Solanki Hospital, Harish Hospital, Sania Hospital, and Geetanjali Hospital. All students got internships, and a few students got internships in government hospitals. Top roles offered are cardio PT, gynecologist PT, ortho PT, neuro PT, sports therapist, clinical therapy, business, etc.

admission_overview.college_name: Lords University Course Admission 2026: Eligibility, Fee, Application Process & Selection

admission_overview.title: Lords University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Lords University admission 2026 is based on merit and entrance-based. The university offers courses such as BBA, BCA, BPT, MBA, and more at the UG and PG levels. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers doctorate and diploma courses. The admission process at Lords University is merit-based. The admission cycle for undergraduate and postgraduate programmes begins in March and ends in September each year. However, for PhD courses, the university conducts academic sessions in winter and summer intake. The application process is online however, candidates can also collect the form from the Admin block, Lords University, and City offices. Lord's University offers more than 15 courses in various streams such as Pharmacy, Science, Management etc. Candidates need to fill out the basic eligibility set by the university for admission.

eligibility_selection.title: Lords University Eligibility & Selection 2026

faqs.question: Do I need to appear for the entrance exam to enrol for admission at Lords University?

paragraphs: Admissions to the UG and PG programmes offered at Lords University are merit-based. The courses offered at Lords University are through regular mode.

Lords University's admission process includes several steps. Candidates who fulfil the specified eligibility can visit the official website of the university or can get the application form offline from the admission office. Interested candidates can follow the below-mentioned steps to completeLords University admission process 2026:
STEP 1: Lords University Application Process 2026

Interested candidates can visit the official website of the university to apply online. However, those who wish to seek offline admissions can visit the admission office to obtain the prescribed application form. The admission cycle for undergraduate and postgraduate programmes begins in March and ends in September each year.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

LU shortlists candidates based on the merit list as per the last educational qualification set by the university. For PhD courses, candidates must appear and clear for PhD entrance exam. NET-qualified candidates are exempted from the PhD entrance exam.
STEP 3: Fee Payment and Seat Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the university releases a merit list. To confirm the seat candidates are required to pay theLords University feeto grab the final seat.

faqs.question: What is the last date to apply for BCA course admission at Lords University?
faqs.answer: Lords University admissions are open online. Till now, no schedule has been released by the university. Since the application portal is live, candidates can apply online for their preferred course. The selection criteria for BCA course is merit-based. However, students can get registered if the final results are awaited and reserve a seat. The mark sheet needs to be shown at the earliest for admission confirmation.

The total tuition fee for BCA course is INR 1.8 lakh.This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

placement_data.title: Lords University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: Lords University has started offering placements to the Class of 2024. As per the latest report, the participating recruiters have placed 27 students of the batch 2024 in new-age job roles. The average package offered so far during Lords University placements 2024 stood at INR 3.60 LPA. Earlier , the highest and average package offered during Lords University placements in 2023 was INR 12 LPA and INR 3.60 LPA, respectively . The top recruiters of Lords University in 2024 placements included India First Life, Niva, Talent Serve, Liv Easy, Signature Sattva, Atharv Pharmaceuticals, etc.

data: A Business Analyst is a professional who works within an organisation to analyze, understand, and document the business processes and systems.

An Investment Banker is a finance professional who works within an investment bank or a financial institution, specializing in providing financial advisory services and raising capital for corporations, governments, and other entities.
The CFO is a high-level executive responsible for managing an organization's financial actions, strategies, and operations.
A Product Manager is a professional responsible for overseeing the development, strategy, and success of a product throughout its lifecycle.
Management consulting involves providing advisory services to organizations to improve their performance, solve problems, and achieve their goals.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good in all aspects, and facilities are very supportive.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is very good and well-maintained. Classrooms are spacious, clean, and equipped with proper seating. Along with fans and smart boards. Projectors were required. Campus has good Wi-Fi connectivity. Computer labs are updated with the necessary software for practical learning. The library is well stocked with textbooks, reference books, and journals. It provides a peaceful study environment.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college and recommend others to take admission.
reviews.review_text: There are multiple Wi Fi networks in the college on each campus. The internet speed is fast. The food quality in the canteen is nice. The surroundings are also clean and neat. You can play multiple sports and games in the college ground.

reviews.review_heading: The college is overall good, but it can also add clinical exposure for students.
reviews.review_text: Our college has air-conditioned classrooms, installed Wi-Fi in the entire college, well-equipped labs, and a good library with many resources related to every course. It has hygienic and good food. The menu has diverse options. The canteen is also maintained with hygiene. Medical facilities are available. Sports and games are also available with a volleyball group or a field for entertainment.

reviews.review_heading: It provides excellent faculty members and placements in 2024.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of the college are good. Wi-Fi facility is available. Labs and classrooms are also well-manufactured. All the required books are available in the library. The canteen is well designed and good. Proper hygienic food is available in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides modern Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, well-equipped labs, a spacious library, and air-conditioned classrooms. It offers clean rooms with good ventilation. It has hygienic mess food, which includes a diverse menu. Medical facilities are available with qualified staff. There is a sports ground and equipment for entertainment.

reviews.review_heading: A decent choice for career-oriented students.
reviews.review_text: We do have 2 labs, 1 common library, and 2 other labs from other departments. The classrooms are normal, only fans, no AC, hostel is also okayish. The food quality is good, currently the canteen is closed, but sports are available here like volleyball, cricket, and badminton.

reviews.review_heading: College review of Lords University.
reviews.review_text: Lords University provides two campuses. One is the south campus, and the second is the north campus. They are old buildings need reconstruction. There are six buildings in the university. In my college, there has been no construction work for a minimum of 5 years.

reviews.review_heading: Lords University, Alwar is a waste of money.
reviews.review_text: Lords University provides a good environment in the hostel. It provides good quality food and gym facilities in the hostel. Lords University also provides AC rooms, and rooms with fans and coolers according to the budget of students.

reviews.review_heading: Taking admission in this college.
reviews.review_text: The water quality is not good; even classrooms are very hot during the summer. The canteen doesn't have any hygiene; it is full of mosquitoes, because of which we don't like to eat there. I hope our college will change the location of the canteen. These are the only things I want to share.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing facilities, hostel rooms, infrastructure, academic cell and education.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is awesome. The university provides amazing facilities on campus and also provides hostels. Hostel rooms are in good condition and regularly cleaned by cleaning staff. The mess is also good. Well-equipped, furnished labs and classrooms. A large and organised library is present on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Lord's University is the best. And they have highly qualified teachers and they help students a lot.
reviews.review_text: The college has high-quality facilities for students. It has a very attractive infrastructure for the college. It provides high-quality hostel facilities and has provided hygienic or high-quality food. It also provides sports facilities, games and other activities. The lab and classroom are well established and provide Wi-Fi facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good but not perfect.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good, classrooms are good but they are not smart classrooms. Wi-Fi facility is provided. Labs are average. Library is good. Hostels are good and food is available in the mess timely. Canteen is good. Medical facilities are also provided. Sports and games are organised occasionally.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Lords University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is managed by Chachan Welfare Department of the college. The quality of the hostel is below average. The food is below average, but facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Come to this college to learn new things.
reviews.review_text:
There are many facilities in this university, like in library there are above 3000 books and journals, in university hostel 24/7 wi-fi, and all hostelers are under camera surveillance and there is also a gym.
Hostel provides breakfast, lunch and dinner for hostelers, and the meal changes everyday .

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with faculty members and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college has the best classrooms, Wi-Fi, and a library. The food served in the canteen is good. Medical facilities are available in our college. Our college provides all sports and games. We have good sports teachers.

highlights.summary: Takshashila University Powered by Sunstone admissions 2025 are open for various courses.

college_info.intro: Takshashila University Powered by Sunstone, popular programmes are BTech and BCA. BCA and BTech courses are taught by highly qualified faculty members. BCA and BTech students are placed in top companies such as Nestle, Amul, Paytm, SBI General, Axis Bank, Muthoot Finance, HDFC Life, Coca-Cola, Zomato, Grow, Wipro, Paisabazar, and many more. Takshashila University Powered by Sunstone students are offered more than 8 months of immersive internship projects in several top companies. There are various facilities available for the Takshashila University Powered by Sunstone students such as cafeteria, seminar hall, labs, and others. Below mentioned are some of the Takshashila University Powered by Sunstone courses and their respective eligibility and Takshashila University Powered by Sunstone fee:

placements.overview:
Sunstone’s Placement Opportunity Program (POP) offers students access to 200+ assured placement opportunities, or a refund of their first-year tuition fee if placements do not meet the commitment. To be eligible for POP, students must maintain a minimum average attendance of 70% across all credit and non-credit classes in every semester. They are also required to clear all examinations with a minimum score of 80% or equivalent CGPA, and must not have any backlogs.

In addition, students must ensure that all fee payments are made as per the timeline outlined in the offer letter. Lastly, students must strictly adhere to the Sunstone Placement Policy Guidelines throughout the program. Check the Takshashila University Powered by Sunstone placements stats below:

admission_process.title: Takshashila University Powered by Sunstone Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Takshashila University Powered by Sunstone admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG level in streams includingEngineering and IT and Software.Takshashila University Powered by Sunstoneadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asJEE Main and CUET. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 2,40,000 - 6,00,000for UG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 3 years - 4 years.

placement_data.title: Takshashila University Powered by Sunstone Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Takshashila University Powered by Sunstone has conducted more than 100 hours’ job-focused boot camps to train students for various job profiles. In addition, the placement team at the University keeps track of the dynamic changes taking place across the world to make sure successful completion of the placement-centric sessions.

As per the latest report, the highest and average package offered during Takshashila University Powered by Sunstone placements in 2025 stood at INR 26 LPA and INR 4.6 LPA, respectively. More than 1,200 companies visited the campus in 2025 and provided jobs in over 50 domains . The top recruiters of Takshashila University Powered by Sunstone placements in 2025 included Nestle, Amul, Paytm, SBI General, Axis Bank, Muthoot Finance, HDFC Life, Coca-Cola, Zomato, Grow, Wipro, Paisabazar, and many more. The ROI recorded was 63% higher rate.

Sunstone’s Placement Opportunity Program (POP) provides students with access to over 200 guaranteed placement opportunities, or they can receive a refund of their first-year tuition if the placements do not fulfill the commitment.

To qualify for POP, students need to maintain at least a 70% average attendance in all credit and non-credit classes each semester. They must also pass all exams with a minimum score of 80% or an equivalent CGPA, and they should not have any backlogs. Furthermore, students must ensure that all fee payments are made according to the schedule specified in the offer letter. Finally, students are required to strictly follow the Sunstone Placement Policy Guidelines throughout the duration of the program.

Sunstone’s Placement Opportunity Program (POP) provides students with access to over 200 guaranteed placement opportunities, or they can receive a refund of their first-year tuition if the placements do not fulfill the commitment.
To qualify for POP, students need to maintain at least a 70% average attendance in all credit and non-credit classes each semester. They must also pass all exams with a minimum score of 80% or an equivalent CGPA, and they should not have any backlogs. Furthermore, students must ensure that all fee payments are made according to the schedule specified in the offer letter. Finally, students are required to strictly follow the Sunstone Placement Policy Guidelines throughout the duration of the program.
Read less

review_content.Placements: Most recruiting companies are telecom and sales-based companies. There is a rare appearance of IT companies. The lowest salary package offered is around 4 LPA - 5 LPA. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Learned lots of lessons in graduation life.

content.Placements: Eamcet qualification is required to place in our course. The highest package offered was 6.0 LPA, the lowest package was 2.5 LPA, and the average package was 3.8 LPA. Top recruitment companies for our course are Hetero and Maintech. Companies hire around 25-30 students. Some of the roles offered by companies are associate engineer, designer, developer, and testing roles.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good and decent. Hostel infrastructure is okay, and facilities are not too high. Basic need facilities are available for students. Coming to the food, the food in the hostel is good, not bad, but food in the canteen is not preferable. I only suggest eating in the canteen once a month. Classroom facilities are nice. We have projectors in every class and power sockets. Wi-Fi is available in the library for laptops. The library is huge and spacious with various types of books. The ground is huge enough for sports and games after college hours.

content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure are available for my course/department. The Wi-Fi is very poor in the college. The classrooms are very nice, and the classrooms are very peaceful. The library is peaceful for studying and reading books in my college.

description: Sai Spurthi Institute of Technology (SSIT, Khammam) cutoff 2025 has been released for admission to MBA programmes via the TSI ICET entrance examination result. Students should scroll down to this page to know the round, category, and year-wise cutoff for TSI ICET and other accepted exams. Refer to the pointers below for more updates:

Sai Spurthi Institute of Technology (SSIT, Khammam) TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 57145 and 102831 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitiv

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning), B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering, with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 57145, 93176 and 96569, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to Sai Spurthi Institute of Technology (SSIT, Khammam). Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The Sai Spurthi Institute of Technology (SSIT, Khammam) MBA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 39643. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 57810, and the 2023 cutoff was 46783 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MBA has been fluctuating in the last 3 years.

reviews.review_heading: Learned lots of lessons in graduation life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good and decent. Hostel infrastructure is okay, and facilities are not too high. Basic need facilities are available for students. Coming to the food, the food in the hostel is good, not bad, but food in the canteen is not preferable. I only suggest eating in the canteen once a month. Classroom facilities are nice. We have projectors in every class and power sockets. Wi-Fi is available in the library for laptops. The library is huge and spacious with various ...

reviews.review_heading: My college is having the .
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure are available for my course/department. The Wi-Fi is very poor in the college. The classrooms are very nice, and the classrooms are very peaceful. The library is peaceful for studying and reading books in my college.

reviews.review_heading: A college with skilled faculty and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our course is good. When it comes to labs, there are 4-5 labs with proficient Wi-Fi and systems that are updated with the latest technology.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good faculty members and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities and infrastructure. Labs and classrooms are neat. We have a library. There is no Wi-Fi in our college. The quality of the hostel facilities is good. The food served in the mess and canteen is average. Medical facilities are available for students. Students can play sports and games on the college ground.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good facilities and infrastructure. All labs and classrooms are good and neat. We have a library. There is no Wi-Fi in our college. The quality of the hostel facilities is average. The quality of the food in the mess and canteen is good. Medical facilities are available in the hostel. We can play sports and games on the ground.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is small. The infrastructure is very good. Hostel is average. The food served in the canteen is not good. Sports are not conducted. Our campus is not Wi-Fi-enabled. There is a decent library in this college.

reviews.review_heading: I'm dissatisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was good but the hostel was not good. Wi-Fi and classrooms were a bit dusty. Library was good. Mess and canteen were not good. Medical facilities were not good. Sports and games were very good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college infrastructure is excellent.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is spread over 5 acres of land. There are well-established laboratories and a library. Our classrooms are always kept clean. The hostel is clean and comfortable. The mess is available in the hostel, and the quality of the food is good.

reviews.review_heading: I am not satisfied with its faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Digital library, canteen, Wi-Fi, and laboratory are available in this college. The food served in the hostel is average. Canteen facility is also good. Medical room is available for emergencies. Sports kits are available but our college management is not interested in sports.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: In our college, seniors and juniors of different branches have separate floors. Labs have good equipment.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the placements at this college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities of the college are good. Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms are good. The quality of the facilities and the quality of food available in the mess are good. Canteen and medical facilities are available. Sports and games are conducted regularly.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sai Spurthi Institute of Technology (SSIT, Khammam).
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in our department are very good. Classrooms are neat, clean, and spacious. The quality of food is not that good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sai Spurthi Institute of Technology (SSIT, Khammam).
reviews.review_text: There are no Wi-Fi facilities in classrooms or labs. Classrooms are comfortable. The capacity of classes is around 60 to 70 members. The quality of the hostel is not good. The food is not good.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with good placements, good infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: All the facilities are provided to get a job and study well any time. Hostel facilities are very good. Food was very good. Wi-Fi and current facilities are very good. Drinking water facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Sai Spurthi Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Every department has its respective labs. Every department has digital classrooms. There is a digital library facility. There is also an internet center for knowing about resources. I have not stayed in the hostel but I suggest not joining this college. In case you joined, don't join in the hostel.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Malla Reddy Institute of Technology offers a wide range of programmes to students at the UG and PG levels. The college is mainly concerned with streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, the college offers courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. At the PG level, the college offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Malla Reddy Institute of Technology courses are offered to students in Full Time mode. Further, the fees structure for Malla Reddy Institute of Technology courses stands around INR 1,14,000 to 2,40,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Malla Reddy Institute of Technology is a good institution for M.E./M.Tech, B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at Malla Reddy Institute of Technology are Electronics & Communication Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Information Technology, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning.

review_content.General: Our college is best in terms of infrastructure facilities like good classrooms, Wi-Fi facility, a big library, and labs for every department in college. In our college, there are separate blocks for each department.  College provides hostel facilities for boys and girls. Quality of food in canteen and hostel mess is excellent. College provides free medical facilities at any time. College has all kinds of transportation. College has good sports grounds for every game.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely satisfied with the placements from our course.

review_content.Placements: Especially in our year, from our course, approximately 67% of students are placed in companies. The highest salary offered is 7 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA, and the average is 4 LPA. The top recruiting companies are JK Construction, DLF, and Tata Pvt Ltd. Approximately 73% of students got their internship certificates from companies after a 6 months internship period. The top roles offered in my course are structural engineer and construction management.
review_content.Infrastructure: From our department, the facilities are amazing. They provide many facilities like AC classrooms, a library, Wi-Fi, an outdoor auditorium, seminar halls, and project labs. The hostel is good, with facilities like a variety of food items in the kitchen and canteen. The rooms are neat and clean, the medical support is there for the students, and the games are unlimited in the college.

reviews_list.review_title: Faculty are very friendly.

review_content.Placements: Placements are pretty good at our college. We had visits from many reputable companies like Cognizant, HCL, Lucid Imaging, Fenestra, L&T Infotech, etc. The college is pretty dedicated to preparing the students for future interviews and other aspects of the selection process. They organize mock interviews and other mock sessions to boost the confidence of the candidates for the future.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostels for boys and girls with spacious rooms, television, newspapers, regular medical check-ups, and yoga classes are provided by the hostel. Many memories were made in the hostel. We celebrated many events in the hostel, too. The hostel caters to the needs of individual students with a comfortable stay and nutritious food (vegetarian and non-vegetarian), prepared in hygienic conditions and RO water is served. Students participate in deciding the menu.

overview_faqs.question: Is Sasurie College of Engineering good?
overview_faqs.answer: Sasurie College of Engineering was established by the Ponmudi Muthusamy Gounder Trust, Tirupur in 2001. The college offers UG and PG courses to students. These courses are provided across the Management, Engineering, Computer Application, and various other streams. The flagship programmes available at this college are B.E./BTech and MBA. The college provides various facilities to students such as sports facilities, library, hostel, and others. The college offers placement assistance to students and is visited by top companies for placements. Hence, it is a good college.

review_summary.college_name: Sasurie College of Engineering Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I loved to be here very much.

content.Placements: Placements are very satisfactory here. No student is left disappointed because the college has a good record in placing all the students. Students get placed in well-reputed organisations like Jaro Education, Amazon, Cognizant, Just Dial, Tech Mahindra, etc. The salary packages offered are spellbound.
content.Infrastructure: The college has all the facilities which an ideal college must have. Students will never get a chance to complain. Sessions by eminent personalities keep happening. They are so motivating in nature. The college is very active in sports that they organize a match of cricket, badminton or kho-kho every weekend.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of "SASURIE COLLEGE OF ENGINEERING". .

content.Placements: Speaking of placements, the placements are reasonably satisfactory at our college. Many reputed companies, such as Cognizant, HCL, Lucid Imaging, Fenestra, and L&T Infotech, visited us in the current academic session, and the college is very committed to molding the students for future interviews and other sessions. To enhance the confidence of the candidates for the future, they conduct interview sessions and other mock sessions.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel offers facilities for boys and girls with large rooms, TV, newspapers, medical checkups, and yoga. A lot of good time was spent in the hostel. We also had many occasions to celebrate in the hostel. The hostel facilities for individual students are comfortable, and the food includes vegetarian and non-vegetarian food that is hygienically prepared with RO water. The students also get to decide what is to be prepared for eating.

individual_reviews.title: Faculty are very friendly.

They organize mock interviews and other mock sessions to boost the confidence of the candidates for the future.
content.Infrastructure: Hostels for boys and girls with spacious rooms, television, newspapers, regular medical check-ups, and yoga classes are provided by the hostel. Many memories were made in the hostel. We celebrated many events in the hostel, too. The hostel caters to the needs of individual students with a comfortable stay and nutritious food (vegetarian and non-vegetarian), prepared in hygienic conditions and RO water is served. Students participate in deciding the menu.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: A Degree to add after my name.

content.Placements: While I completed my course, there were no on campus interview opportunity given to us. Not even a single company visited our college. We try our best outside and struggle a lot. Management doesn't care about students. Their only motive is collection of fees.
content.Infrastructure: Though enough buildings are available, maximum are on construction phase. We did our classes in between people involving in construction process. Maintenance of building are also worse. Can you imagine a class there the wall are not finished and shows it skeleton to us.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college with infrastructure and teachers but should call more companies for placements.

content.Placements: Around 189 students cored students are placed. The salary offered ranges between Rs. 20,000 per month to Rs. 30,000 per month. An average salary package offered varies from Rs. 12,000 per month to Rs. 30,000 per month. Top recruiting companies of our college are CRI Pumps, TCS, and Sakthi. Roles offered was as supervisors and quality in-charge. Students of our course should score above 6.5 CGPA in their academics to get an internship. Maximum companies are excepting 6.5 CGPA, and some companies expect above 7.5 CGPA.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a good infrastructure. The college provides facilities such as lab, transport, library, good classrooms, canteen, and hostel facilities. Sports facilities are also provided to students. Good hostel facilities are available, and the food served is also good and hygienic. They also provide Wi-Fi facility.

admission_process.title: Sasurie College of Engineering Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Sasurie College of Engineering admissionsare completely based on entrance exam scores as per the course requirements. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Sasurie College of Engineering is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Sasurie College of Engineering Application Process 2025
The application mode is online. For admission to various programmes, aspirants need to apply at the official website. Candidates can fill out the application form on the institute's official website.
STEP 2: Selection
The institute admits students based on entrance exam scores for all courses. Aspirants must have valid TANCET/ GATE/CEETA and TNEA scores for course admission.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation
Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theSasurie College of Engineering feeto confirm their seats at the institute.

faqs.question: Admission to BTech at Sasurie College of Engineering is merit-based or entrance-based?
faqs.answer: Admission to BTech at Sasurie College of Engineering is based on TNEA scores. The Directorate of Technical Education, Tamil Nadu and Anna University conduct this counselling process. To get admission through TNEA, admission will be based on marks obtained by the candidates in the relevant subjects, namely, Maths, Physics and Chemistry, which will be reduced to 200 (Maths – 100, Physics – 50 and Chemistry – 50).

courses_data.name: Sasurie College of Engineering MBA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Sasurie College of Engineering MBAis a two-year postgraduate course, divided into four semesters, and offers full-time mode. Further, the second year of theSCE Tirupur MBA coursespecialises students in elective fields likeFinance, HR, Marketing &Business Analytics. The minimum eligibility requirement to get admission into anMBA courseis candidates must complete their bachelor’s degree with decent scores.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admissions to MBA course at Sasurie College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: The primary eligibility requirement to get admission into MBA courses is candidates must complete their graduation in any field. Additionally, for the selection process, the college accepts TANCET scores, followed by counseling. The TANCET exam is the first step, conducted by Anna University, and serves as the gateway for admissions to MBA courses at Sasurie College of Engineering and its other affiliated colleges.

faqs.question: When can I apply for MBA course at Sasurie College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Sasurie College of Engineering MBA admission forms for 2025are open for the new academic year, and candidates who want to take admission to the MBA course offered at Sasurie College of Engineering can apply online for MBA admission. Moreover, before applying for the course, candidates must ensure that they complete the basic eligibility requirements.

faqs.question: What are the parameters responsible for increase/ decrease of Sasurie College of Engineering MBA cutoff?
faqs.answer: When determining the cutoff for the Sasurie College of Engineering MBA course, officials consider the examination and admissions aspects for the initial phase. The above factors will be examined and considered by officials when determining the cutoff for Sasurie College of Engineering MBA: previous years' cutoff trends, difficulty level of the exam, total number of candidates qualified, total number of candidates for a course, number of seats available, and so on. faqs.answer: The total fee for MBA courses at Sasurie College of Engineering includes multiple components, such as tuition fees, admission fees, and various other charges. The total tuition fee for an MBA course ranges from INR 35,000.The fee amount mentioned is sourced from the official website/sanctioning body and is subject to change.Therefore, it is indicative.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to various courses at Sasurie College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: The institute offers various courses such as B.E/BTech, M.E and MBA courses at the UG and PG level. The selection criteria is entrance-based as per respective courses. faqs.question: When can I apply for BTech course at Sasurie College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Sasurie College of Engineering BTech admission forms for 2025are open for the new academic year, and candidates who want to take admission to any of the BTech specialisations offered at Sasurie College of Engineering can apply online for BTech admission.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for MBA course at Sasurie College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: The total seat intake for MBA course at  Sasurie College of Engineering is 60. The primary eligibility requirement to get admission into MBA courses is candidates must complete their graduation in any field. Additionally, for the selection process, the college accepts TANCET scores, followed by counseling.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for BTech course at Sasurie College of Engineering?
faqs.answer: Sasurie College of Engineering offers more than eight specialsiations in BTech courses. The total seat intake for all BTech specialisation is 600. To get a seat in the programme, a candidate must complete their Class 12 in the PCM stream with at least 45% aggregate. For the selection, the college accepts TNEA. This is the online counselling process that Anna University conducts for admission to BE/ BTech programmes in Tamil Nadu engineering colleges. The basis of selection is Class 12 marks; no entrance exam is conducted.

placement_data.title: Sasurie College of Engineering Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The placement report for the 2025 season at Sasurie College of Engineering has been published on the official website. The highest package offered to the BE CSE/AIDS branch reached INR 4.7 LPA . The lowest package recorded is INR 2.3 LPA for the BE ECE branch. The overall BE/BTech placement rate stands at 90% . Prominent recruiters like HCL, Tech Mahindra , and Cognizant are included in the list of companies participating in the 2025 placements at Sasurie College of Engineering .

The placement office at Sasurie College of Engineering is responsible for making the best arrangements and providing hospitality for visiting company officials. It provides facilities for written tests, group discussions, and interviews. Over the years, it has significantly improved its effectiveness in enhancing placement opportunities. The office plays a crucial role in counseling and guiding college students towards successful career placements.

hostel_campus.college_name: Sasurie College of Engineering Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: I loved to be here very much.
reviews.review_text: The college has all the facilities which an ideal college must have. Students will never get a chance to complain. Sessions by eminent personalities keep happening. They are so motivating in nature. The college is very active in sports that they organize a match of cricket, badminton or kho-kho every weekend.

reviews.review_heading: Review of "SASURIE COLLEGE OF ENGINEERING". .
reviews.review_text: The hostel offers facilities for boys and girls with large rooms, TV, newspapers, medical checkups, and yoga. A lot of good time was spent in the hostel. We also had many occasions to celebrate in the hostel. The hostel facilities for individual students are comfortable, and the food  includes vegetarian and non-vegetarian food that is hygienically prepared with RO water. The students also get to decide what is to be prepared for eating.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty are very friendly.
reviews.review_text: Hostels for boys and girls with spacious rooms, television, newspapers, regular medical check-ups, and yoga classes are provided by the hostel. Many memories were made in the hostel. We celebrated many events in the hostel, too. The hostel caters to the needs of individual students with a comfortable stay and nutritious food (vegetarian and non-vegetarian), prepared in hygienic conditions and RO water is served. Students participate in deciding the menu.

reviews.review_heading: A Degree to add after my name.
reviews.review_text: Though enough buildings are available, maximum are on construction phase. We did our classes in between people involving in construction process. Maintenance of building are also worse. Can you imagine a class there the wall are not finished and shows it skeleton to us.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with infrastructure and teachers but should call more companies for placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good infrastructure. The college provides facilities such as lab, transport, library, good classrooms, canteen, and hostel facilities. Sports facilities are also provided to students. Good hostel facilities are available, and the food served is also good and hygienic. They also provide Wi-Fi facility.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good faculty members and provides many placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The campus is very big. Management studies, arts and science, and engineering departments are available on the campus. There are separate hostels for both boys and girls on the campus. Cafeteria, football ground, and a parking slot for students as well as staff vehicles are available. Overall, the infrastructure of our college is good.

reviews.review_heading: Good for coaching, good placement team and average sports. Supportive, but not good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: About the sports, there are two major grounds. One for cricket and the other one for football. Also, for the atherosclerosis games also, the grounds are available, but there will be no support from the college. If you are a sports person then you have to take care of everything, and there is a Wi-Fi facility, but not for students. Labs are there, but all are of the modern equipment. Canteen is quite average. The classrooms are there with no problems as you will have a projector in each class. Th...

The infrastructure of the college is good. The college provides good lab facilities for computer engineering and electronics. Placements are just average but poor extracurricular activities. Hostel infrastructure is good but the mess food and canteen is not worth for money. Girl’s hostel is much secured and the faculty is very friendly. The infrastructure of the college is good. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.MBA/PGDMCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.M.E./M.TechCandidate who have completed 10+2+AMIE or 10+3 years Diploma + AMIE are also eligible. AMIE candidate must have 2 years regular full time experience in the relevant field.

overview_faqs.question: Is SCAD College Of Engineering And Technology a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at SCAD College Of Engineering And Technology are B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, SCAD College Of Engineering And Technology has a rating of 3.8 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 4.1, 3.5, 3.7 and 3.9 as per reviews by students.

review_summary.college_name: SCAD College Of Engineering And Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: My 4-year experience is quite good, placements are good. Overall, I rate this college 4/5.

content.Placements: Around 80% of students were placed in a company through campus interviews. The highest salary package offered is 8 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 1.8 LPA. Top recruiting companies are iWave, Oneyes Information Tech, Roriri, XBI4, Centizen, and Kissflow. Around 60% of students got internships at companies like Talrop and Kissflow. Top roles offered are full stack developer, embedded engineer, backend developer, data analyst, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are commendable across departments, with 24/7 Wi-Fi. The speed is average and it can be rated as 3.5 out of 5. Labs are clean and well-maintained and can be rated as 4.5 out of 5. Classrooms are decent and can be rated as 4 out of 5. Hostel quality is good and rated as 3.8 out of 5. The food in the hostel and canteen is affordable and satisfactory, and it rated as 4 out of 5. Medical facilities include transport to hospital and rated as 4.3 out of 5. Sports events are conducted like football, cricket, badminton, volleyball, and athletics. Sports are excellent and rated as 4.75 out of 5.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Honest review of SCAD College of Engineering and technology!

content.Placements: According to the recent downturn in job opportunities at major companies like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, etc. The placement opportunities are a little bit poor. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA and most of the companies are low-tier companies. Paid internship opportunities are provided by the institution every year as well as this year. The top roles offered in my domain are network engineer, front-end developer and junior software developer.
content.Infrastructure: The campus infrastructure is excellent and there are so many facilities inside the campus. Wi-fi is available in each department. The quality of the facilities in the hostel is good and the food provided in the hostel and the college canteen is healthy. Medical facilities are available on the college campus.

reviews.review_heading: Life at SCAD engineering college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities include Wi-Fi, labs, and classrooms. The Wi-Fi is high-speed, and the labs are equipped with computers. The quality of food available in the college hostel is average. A medical room is available. Sports and games are also available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: We have a library period every week. Each classroom has many windows, benches, and fans. The food served in the hostel is good. Our college has a canteen. Medical facilities are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because it does not provide good practical experiments.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good atmosphere and infrastructure. Wi-Fi facility is not available, and labs are average. The library and classrooms are good. The hostel is not bad. The food served is average. Our college gives importance to sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good for education but not placements.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are moderate. Lab facilities are not well-maintained. The infrastructure is not bad, but it needs proper maintenance. Wi-Fi is available but limited. The library is a good place for learning. It contains all the books and system facilities.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for education growth.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is awesome, and the scenery was also very beautiful. The college canteen is undertaken by the college, so food was good. Sports also have good involvement.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides many facilities. Placements in 2019 have been good.
reviews.review_text: The college provides many facilities. There are five departments in our college. Physical, technical and non-technical events are conducted here. Manufacturing laboratory, multi-purpose computer lab, advanced electrical equipment and labs are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement in 2024.
reviews.review_text: Labs were very clean and super comfortable to do any practical work. Free Wi-Fi was also available for the learning process. The libraries were perfect, with many course-related books. This made it easy for us to learn anything. In 6 working days, there were 4 vegetarian meals and 2 non-vegetarian meals. The food was also hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure with friendly and supportive staff.
reviews.review_text: Fully equipped lab facilities with internet connection, and they have separate labs for each course and department. Spacious classrooms, seminar halls, and an auditorium. Various authors' books are available in the library. Clean and neat hostel with 3 people in a room. Hostel food is decently good compared to outside food.

reviews.review_heading: I want to know about SCAD engineering and teach it.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of the college are good. There are Wi-Fi facilities available on the college campus. Libraries are equipped with a good amount of the latest edition books. The quality of the facilities in my hostel is average. The mess food is average, and the accommodation in the hostel is good. Medical facilities are available in both the hostel and the college. Sports and games are supported by the college's management.

reviews.review_heading: Review of SCAD College Of Engineering And Technology.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good lab and good medical facilities. The college provides good sports facilities and a good gym for the students. Students in the college have won zonal level competitions, mainly weight lifting and powerlifting.

college_info.college_name: Eklavya University: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: Eklavya University is an university in Damoh, Madhya Pradesh. The institute is approved by the AICTE. At the UG, PG and After 10th levels, the institute offers 20 courses across 11 specialisations in Full Time mode. The popular Eklavya University programs include B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, MBA/PGDM and After 10th Diploma. Eklavya University courses are provided in several streams including Engineering and Business & Management Studies, etc. The institute has a total seat intake of 849 students. The institute has a well-laid infrastructure with multiple facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure and facilities in the university.

review_content.Placements: Minimum 70 percent of students were placed in my course. The highest package is 7 Lacs and the lowest package is 2 Lacs in my course. The top recruiting companies for the course are Amazon, Wipro Ltd., etc. Minimum 70 percent of students got internships from my course and in which companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: My course/department is provided Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library, with the best facilities and infrastructure available in college. The best facilities are in this hostel, and canteen and mess snacks are of good quality. Food is available. Medical, sports, and games are the best facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: It is a very good university.

review_content.Placements: We are the first batch of our college. There are around 60 students in our class, so mostly all students got placed in well-reputed IT companies like TCS, Wipro, Tech Mahendra, Capgemini, Accenture, etc. The average salary package offered is 4.5 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has multiple classrooms. It has a very peaceful library. It has every type of reading book. In practical labs, all equipment is available for practical.
review_content.Faculty: Our professors have more than 5 years of experience. They teach topics very easily. All faculty members are very friendly. They teach every topic very well until you get to understand it. They teach every topic with real-world examples. They conduct a monthly test for revision for good preparation. They are very supportive. They teach every topic practically.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has great faculty members, excellent placements, and impressive infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Almost 60% of students got placed in companies. The average salary package offered in our college is 3.5 LPA. The top role offered is a customer care executive.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college and hostel is good. The hostel provides facilities like Wi-Fi, classrooms, a library, etc. Everything is available in our college. The hostel is good.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members, the curriculum, courses, and exams of our college are the best. Our faculty members support every student. They are very knowledgeable. Semester examinations are good. The course structure is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Really very outstanding university.

review_content.Placements: Placements: My batch is the first batch of Eklavya University, and there are 60 students in my CSE class. 90% of the students in my batch are placed. Most students are placed in technical MNCs like TCS, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, Accenture, and Capgemini.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my university is very peaceful and attractive. There are also mess and hostel facilities. My university has a large library with resources for learning everything related to our course, along with motivational books. There is also a playground for extracurricular activities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Our university is a very good.

review_content.Placements: We are the 1st batch of our university. Our group is the best group. Placements are good. 95% of students are placed with a salary of 2.7 lakh in TCS, Wipro, Accenture, Tech Mahindra, and Capgemini. The average package is 4.5 lakh, and the facilities at my university are nice.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our university facilities are great. The university Wi-Fi is always good, the labs are very good, and the library is excellent. Hostel facilities are like a family. Mess food is good, and sports are very great. My university has very peaceful and attractive infrastructure.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Really very good infrastructure .

review_content.Placements: We are the first batch of Eklavya University. There are 70 students in my class. 95% of students are placed in different types of companies. And now we are all joining the company, which is working well. We are all working in the technical field as junior developers.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is very attractive and peaceful infrastructure at our university. There is a canteen and hostel. And also university-recognized games or sports and provide awards for rank and good work. They provide opportunities to play games on a competitive level. They also provide training for games and sports.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: This college is best for non-attending students. I would not recommend to regular students.

content.Placements: Need an improvement when it comes to placements and many MNCs do not visit for placements. Students had to look for off-campus placements. The highest salary package offered was around 6 LPA. The average salary package offered was 3 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 2 LPA. Bharti Airtel was the top recruiting company. Almost 60% of students got internships in Airtel, Huawei, Nokia, Tech Mahindra, and HCL. RF engineer and software engineer were the top roles offered by this course.
content.Infrastructure: The library and laboratories were fine in this college. The Wi-Fi was enabled. In the library, students will get only syllabus-related books. I never tasted mess food so I cannot say about it, but in canteen, students will get tea or coffee and some fast food. The sports facilities were not provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: SKITM is a good college for professional studies in Delhi-NCR.

content.Placements: The placements in our college are quite good and increasing every year along with very good packages. The course I am studying has a record of good placements. Government organisations also visit the college to pick the students at good packages. About 80% of the students get placed every year.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is quite good. There are well-equipped labs. Medical facilities are good along with the small-scale hospital, with well-qualified and experienced doctors. The college canteen has good menu with not high prices, and hygiene is maintained well.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: A decent choice with Good Faculty and infrastructure ,Best scope for better placement

content.Placements: The placement performance of SKITM college approximately 40-60% of students secure placement annually . Highest package of SKITM is 8 lakh per annum. Top recruiting companies like HCL, HONDA,Maruti Suzuki, HDFC Bank and more. Top role offered in course opportunities in engineering ,management and technical positions.
content.Infrastructure: The institute features 27 air-conditional lecture halls ,five modern teaching aids to facilitate effective learning. The library serves as an integrated knowledge resources center,housing,over 6,000 books. Separate hostel for boys and girls .These hostels are designed to offer a comfortable environment.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: You can think about to take admission in SKITM College Bahadurgarh.

content.Placements: 10 to 20% of students are placed on the campus. The highest package is in between 4.5 to 5 LPA. The college offers only Engineering courses. And, I am still waiting for the placement companies and hope we would be placed as soon as possible. In my course the top recruiting companies are L&T, TATA Elxsi, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good here but there is no hostel facility on or outside the campus. Labs and classes are well-maintained but there is no Wi-Fi in the college. Canteen is good but there is no medical facilities. Annually they organize some functions related to sports and games, and other award functions.

reviews_list.review_title: It is a very good college.

review_content.Placements: Placements in the college were good for our senior batch. Only 1 company visited the campus for placements of our batch. The role of technical support was offered. The salary package offered was 1.5 LPA. Almost 50% of students got internships. The highest stipend offered was Rs. 7,000. The lowest stipend offered was nil as it was only for learning. The placement cell was useful.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. Facilities like labs, library, medical, sports and games, and Wi-Fi, are good. The quality of classrooms and labs is good. Hostel rooms were good. The quality of the food served in our canteen was good. I didn't face any issues regarding the infrastructure of the college during my tenure.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Teachers are good, but there are very less placements. Infrastructure and facilities are not good.

review_content.Placements: DRDO visits our college for placements. Executive engineer and mechanical engineer roles are offered for the mechanical department. Security manager roles are offered for ladies in central government in the airport. So, many students from our college joined as faculty members or non-teaching staff members in colleges, institutes and also universities. Some students are also working in the industry.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is poor here, and there are a minimum number of labs. However, classrooms are good, and the library is also good. The hostel is not good, but the mess is better. There are no medical facilities, sports and games. The quality of the food served is also not good. There is no boys hostel on the campus. I suggest that our college should provide sports and games for students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the faculty, curriculum and placements.

review_content.Placements: 1.5% of students were placed in my course. 2. 10k to 15k is the range of salary offered. 3. There is no top recruiting companies in the college. 4. 45% of people get internships in small companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: 1. The facilities and labs are good but the equipment are less, the classrooms are good, the library is also okay. 2. Hostel was bad, food quality in mess was also bad, the canteen is good, the medical facilities are good, sport and games are of very good quality.
review_content.Faculty: The teachers are helpful. The teachers are neither well qualified nor knowledgeable. The teaching quality is bad and there is no particular time table that is followed. There is no maintenance and no care for students.
