faqs.answer: Nova College Of Engineering And Technology, Ibrahimpatnam has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible. Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis. Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana. Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). There is no upper age limit.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute. 45% marks for BC categories. Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible. Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition by Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB. Candidate who passed all the subjects of the three years of any Degree course in one sitting is not eligible for admission.After 10th DiplomaCandidates should have passed S.S.C. Examination (Class 10th) conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the Board of Secondary Education, A.P/TS. such as CBSE, ICSE, NIOS, A.P. Open School Society (APOSS), X class examination conducted by various State Boards of Secondary Education in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects, and obtained atleast 35% marks in the qualifying examination. Candidates belonging to NIOS/TOSS/APOSS/CBSE/ICSE/Other Examinations recognised as equivalent to SSC by A.P. Govt. should have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% marks in each subject. Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held

The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, Nova College Of Engineering And Technology, Ibrahimpatnam has a rating of 3 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 2.8, 2.7, 3.3 and 3.5 as per reviews by students.

review_summary.college_name: Nova College Of Engineering And Technology, Ibrahimpatnam Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied because of its teachers but provides good placements for 2020 and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Around 70% of students were placed in our course. The average salary package offered was 2 LPA. Start-up companies were recruiting students. Around 50% of students got internships, and good roles were offered. Most of the students were placed with good packages.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure were good in this college. Wi-Fi was enabled, and laboratories and classrooms were also good. The quality of the hostel was good, and the food and canteen were also good. Sports facilities were provided, and medical facilities were also provided.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college.

content.Placements: Placements in the college were good for our senior batch. Only 1 company visited the campus for placements of our batch. The role of technical support was offered. The salary package offered was 1.5 LPA. Almost 50% of students got internships. The highest stipend offered was Rs. 7,000. The lowest stipend offered was nil as it was only for learning. The placement cell was useful.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. Facilities like labs, library, medical, sports and games, and Wi-Fi, are good. The quality of classrooms and labs is good. Hostel rooms were good. The quality of the food served in our canteen was good. I didn't face any issues regarding the infrastructure of the college during my tenure.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Teachers are good, but there are very less placements. Infrastructure and facilities are not good.

content.Placements: DRDO visits our college for placements. Executive engineer and mechanical engineer roles are offered for the mechanical department. Security manager roles are offered for ladies in central government in the airport. So, many students from our college joined as faculty members or non-teaching staff members in colleges, institutes and also universities. Some students are also working in the industry.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi facility is poor here, and there are a minimum number of labs. However, classrooms are good, and the library is also good. The hostel is not good, but the mess is better. There are no medical facilities, sports and games. The quality of the food served is also not good. There is no boys hostel on the campus. I suggest that our college should provide sports and games for students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the faculty, curriculum and placements.

content.Placements: 1.5% of students were placed in my course. 2. 10k to 15k is the range of salary offered. 3. There is no top recruiting companies in the college. 4. 45% of people get internships in small companies.
content.Infrastructure: 1. The facilities and labs are good but the equipment are less, the classrooms are good, the library is also okay. 2. Hostel was bad, food quality in mess was also bad, the canteen is good, the medical facilities are good, sport and games are of very good quality.
content.Faculty: The teachers are helpful. The teachers are neither well qualified nor knowledgeable. The teaching quality is bad and there is no particular time table that is followed. There is no maintenance and no care for students.

faqs.question: How can I get into Nova College Of Engineering And Technology, Ibrahimpatnam for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
Nova College Of Engineering And Technology, Ibrahimpatnam has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed Diploma in Engineering or any other examination recognised as equivalent there to, from a recognised Institute/ University, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana are also eligible.
Candidates who have appeared in Diploma in Engineering and who are awaiting their results can also apply on provisional basis.
Candidates should belong to the state of Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana.
Candidate should have completed 16 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023).
There is no upper age limit.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have completed Bachelor degree of 3/4 years duration with above mentioned marks from any recognised University/Institute.
45% marks for BC categories.
Candidate who are appearing for the final year degree examination are also be eligible.
Degree obtained by Distance Mode Program should have recognition

reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely satisfied with its faculty members and placements in 2021.

review_content.Placements: Every year, 75% of students get placed in good companies in UP, Haryana, etc. Companies like Puzzlona, Gillette, Maruti, etc., came to hire students. On every floor, two sweepers are available for cleaning every day.

hostel_campus.college_name: Indraprastha Institute of Management and Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good teachers.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college has labs, Wi-Fi, classrooms, etc. Classrooms are good.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with its faculty members and placements in 2021.
reviews.review_text: It had well-maintained classrooms. Every day, they conduct sports. It had a computer lab, a surveying lab, etc. Medical facilities were good. The canteen food was far better than others. It was like homemade food. The hostel had big rooms. Some rooms had attached washrooms. There are 2 big common bathrooms on every floor. On every floor, two sweepers are available for cleaning every day.

reviews.review_heading: Placement is average. According to the college's fee, infrastructure is okay.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructures of this college is good, not beautiful but it is good. Only labs are there. Cafeteria is very bad. According to the fees they charge, this college is perfect. It all depends on your financial condition, if it is good then you can go for some other college.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied by the facilities, good placement records and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Courses are the best and hostel facilities are also great. Quality of food is best and it is available at a proper time. But sometimes it's not good for some students because daily, they serve the same food. Sometimes it's not properly cooked. Sports day is also organised every year in which students take part to achieve prizes. Some of them give their best to go higher in that particular sports. Many students from my college have gone to play sports at national level.

faqs.answer: Oriental Institute of Science and Technology, Jabalpur has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed 10+2 or equivalent with Physics, Maths & Chemistry/ Biotech./ Biology/ Tech. Voc. subject/ Comp. Sc./ IT/ Informatics Practices/ Agriculture/ Engineering Graphics/ Business studies as optional subjects with the above-mentioned aggregate percentage (40% for SC/ST/OBC candidates (except Creamy layer) candidates belonging to Madhya Pradesh) in subjects taken together. Candidates passed 10+2 with grading system, must have grades equi. to mentioned aggregate %. Result awaited student are also eligible on provisional basis. OR Candidate who have passed Diploma in Engg. & Tech. examination with at least 45% masks (40% marks in case of candidates belonging to SC/ST/OBC (excluding creamy layer) category of Madhya Pradesh) Subject to vacancies in the First Year, in case the vacancies at lateral entry are exhausted.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th class examination/SSC examination or equivalent examination from any recognised board/center (10+2) system.

faqs.answer: Guru Nanak Institute of Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidates who belonging to reserved categories must have obtained 45% marks in aggregate from recognised board.MBA/PGDMCandidate must have passed Bachelor Degree (BA / B.Com/ B.Sc/ BBA / BBM / BCA / BE / B.Tech / B. Pharmacy / Any 3 or 4 year Degree except Oriental Languages). Examinations of minimum three years duration with the mentioned marks (45 % marks in BC Category ) in aggregate from a recognised Institute/ University. The qualifying degree obtained by the Distance Mode Program/ Open Distance Learning (ODL) should have recognition by the Joint Committee of UGC, AICTE and DEC/DEB as per UGC Regulations of 2013. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis. The minimum age of the candidates should be 19 years as on the date of notification (Candidates whose date of Birth up to 30th MARCH, 2004). No maximum age limit.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh. Candidates should have completed 16 years of age, as on 31st December of the year of admission. There is no upper age limit.

highlights.summary: WBJEE 2026 registration has begun for Aliah University -Old Campus (Taltala) admission to the BE/BTech course. Students can register till Apr 5, 2026, for the exam scheduled for May 24, 2026.

placements.overview:
WBJEE 2026 registration has begun for Aliah University -Old Campus (Taltala) admission to the BE/BTech course. Students can register till Apr 5, 2026, for the exam scheduled for May 24, 2026.

Aliah University -Old Campus (Taltala), is located in Kolkata, West Bengal. Established in 1780, it is a public university approved by NCTE, AICTE and INC. Aliah University -Old Campus (Taltala) provides 53 UG and PG courses in 16 specialisations, namely Botany, Chemistry, Civil Engineering, Computer Science Engineering and Electrical Engineering. Theses programmes are offered in Full Time mode. B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, Executive MBA/PGDM, B.Sc. and M.Sc. are some of the courses offered at Aliah University -Old Campus (Taltala). Some of the streams in which these courses are offered include Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Mass Communication & Media, Law and Humanities & Social Sciences. The total fee at Aliah University -Old Campus (Taltala) ranges between INR 1,200 to 50,000. Aliah University -Old Campus (Taltala) has a student intake of 2420 for all the courses. The average median package at Aliah University -Old Campus (Taltala) is INR 4,31,898. Aliah University -Old Campus (Taltala) offers all the infrastructural facilities to students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Review of All Saint's College of Technology.

review_content.Placements: 70-80% of students got placed. The average package offered is 4 LPA, and the highest package is 18 LPA. Students got internships in software development and testing too. The percentage required to get an internship is 60-70%.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is amazing and attractive. All the labs are really great, and the rooms have Wi-Fi and other facilities. The library is very good. You will feel great in the library and reading books.
review_content.Faculty: The teachers are always supportive in a positive way. If students want some educational knowledge at any time, they are always available for students. They try to make students competitive and focus on their goals.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: Average College with average placement not so good environment.

review_content.Placements: Through a semester of online teaching experience, the overall experience is good, each recording symposium, so for some details need to check some homework or miss a class provides a very convenient service, but on the other hand, the participation degree of the classroom is not very ideal, network connection and noise is also one of the reasons affecting the quality of teaching. Overall the experience was good. Top recruiting companies are TCS, infosys, capgemini, etc. Packages offered are between 1.8 to 6 Lacs .
review_content.Infrastructure: Almost as I expected, beautiful city, good campus experience, the teachers are very friendly and will patiently solve the problems raised by the students. The local people are also very friendly. Life after school is not particularly boring. You can go to the supermarket and feed the ducks by the river.

faqs.question: Q: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?

faqs.answer: The best choice depends on your career aspirations:· If you want to become a teacher: Opt for a B.Ed. It's the mandatory qualification for teaching in most schools.· If you want to pursue a career in research or a science-related field: A BSc would be more suitable. It provides a strong foundation for further studies and specialised careers.· If you're unsure: Consider your interests and skills. Do you enjoy teaching and interacting with students? Or are you more drawn to scientific exploration and research? Additional options:· M.Ed.: If you already have a B.Ed., you can pursue a Master of Education for career advancement or specialisation in a particular teaching area.· Diploma courses: Various specialised Diploma courses in education or related fields can enhance your skills and knowledge.

overview_faqs.question: Can All Saint's College of Technology be considered a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: All Saint's College of Technology is a renowned institution offering M.E./M.Tech, B.E. / B.Tech. Students can choose these courses to embark on their careers in the field of Engineering. The institute is staffed with highly skilled and experienced faculty members dedicated to delivering these programs. All Saint's College of Technology boasts an impressive review rating of 3.43 based on student feedback at Shiksha. Additionally, it has received a rating of 3.58 for Campus Life, 2.88 for Placements, 3.58 for Faculty, and 3.58 for Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?
overview_faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses

review_summary.college_name: All Saint's College of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: For the students of lateral entry, this college is the best.

content.Placements: Delhi NCR and Pune-based companies come for placement drives, but they are offering low pay scales. The average placement is about 2.4 LPA. Most students are placed in the designing and drafting field, and internships depend on you; they don't provide internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is excellent, and there are mostly all the labs available. They organize workshops like total station and similar topics from time to time. However, hostel facilities are not up to the mark. Sports are available, but the canteen only offers snacks, not lunch.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of All Saint's College of Technology.

content.Placements: Hi, I am Ritik Patel, from All Saint's College of Technology, Bhopal, MP. This is a very good college for a good future and the college faculty is great with a supportive nature and responsibility. Around 70 to 80 percent of students get placement at this college. The highest package is 4.5 LPA, the average packages are 3.3 to 3.8 LPA and the lowest package is 1.8 LPA. Companies like Mahindra and Mahindra, Cognizant, Dickon, Reliance industries and many others are the top recruiters. Approximately 70 percent of students got internships from here and got a 10,000 stipend monthly.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Review of All Saint's College of Technology.

content.Placements: 70-80% of students got placed. The average package offered is 4 LPA, and the highest package is 18 LPA. Students got internships in software development and testing too. The percentage required to get an internship is 60-70%.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is amazing and attractive. All the labs are really great, and the rooms have Wi-Fi and other facilities. The library is very good. You will feel great in the library and reading books.
content.Faculty: The teachers are always supportive in a positive way. If students want some educational knowledge at any time, they are always available for students. They try to make students competitive and focus on their goals.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Average College with average placement not so good environment.

content.Placements: Through a semester of online teaching experience, the overall experience is good, each recording symposium, so for some details need to check some homework or miss a class provides a very convenient service, but on the other hand, the participation degree of the classroom is not very ideal, network connection and noise is also one of the reasons affecting the quality of teaching. Overall the experience was good. Top recruiting companies are TCS, infosys, capgemini, etc. Packages offered are between 1.8 to 6 Lacs .
content.Infrastructure: Almost as I expected, beautiful city, good campus experience, the teachers are very friendly and will patiently solve the problems raised by the students. The local people are also very friendly. Life after school is not particularly boring. You can go to the supermarket and feed the ducks by the river.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: A good college with awesome facilities.

content.Placements: ACE Construction, RLF Infrastructure, Paras Home Pvt. Ltd., BHEL, and Manit visit the campus to conduct placements, and they are among the most famous companies in Bhopal and also India. 12 to 15 students get selected for internships every year. The starting salary offered to the students was Rs. 15,000, and some students get Rs. 20,000 according to their knowledge and work experience (if they have any). The salaries in civil core companies increase for every 4 months.
content.Infrastructure: The college building is old because ASCT is the oldest college in Bhopal. The college surroundings are very eco-friendly. The ground is huge compared to other colleges, and that's why Bhopal college cricket championship is held in ASCT every year. The canteen is available on the campus. Water coolers are available. The campus is under CCTV surveillance.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Review of Lokmanya Tilak Jankalyan Shikshan Sanstha's Priyadarshini Bhagwati College of Engineering.

content.Placements: In our college, about 80% of the students are placed in top companies like Accenture, Cognizant, etc. The highest, lowest, and average packages offered by companies are 12 LPA, 9 LPA, and 3 LPA. The companies offer data analyst roles, web developer roles, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities in our college are excellent. The labs for hardware and software practices are well-maintained and clean. The quality of the hostel is quite good, and the mess is also provided by the hostel. The food quality provided by the hostel is healthy and tasty.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: College provides good infrastructure & well-designed labs, and the teaching staff is understandable.

content.Placements: In our Computer Science and Engineering branch, the placement percentage of students in the 2025 batch is nearly about 70%, which is much better than our previous batch. The highest package, average package, and the lowest package offered in our course are 12 LPA, 6 LPA, and 3.5 LPA respectively. The top recruiting companies in our course are Accenture, Tech Mahindra, Technook, Deltax, etc. Most of the students got internships in various domains like Android app development, MERN stack development, Java development, etc. in companies like Infosys, Tech Mahindra, Smart ED, etc. And nearly 80% of students got internships.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with our course and placements.

content.Placements: The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. Infosys, TCS, Cognizant, Capgemini, etc., visit our college.
content.Infrastructure: Our college provides the best infrastructure and facilities like free Wi-Fi, a library, labs, classrooms, a canteen, good and hygienic food, etc. The food served in the canteen has good value for money.
content.Faculty: We have the best knowledgeable teachers. They provide education. They are supportive and cooperative. Our college makes students industry-ready. Semester exams are moderate.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: The faculty members and facilities are excellent, with an outstanding environment.

content.Placements: The average package offered is around 2.5 LPA. More than 60 students get placed every year. Aptitude training is provided along with technical practice interviews and group discussions conducted in advance so that students can easily get their dream job.
content.Infrastructure: This college has an excellent infrastructure with a library, computer labs, seminar halls, canteen, etc., with a well-maintained decorum. Overall, the infrastructure is the best, with greenery all around the campus. All around the campus, hygiene is maintained.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: The college was good in academics and extra curricular activities but average in placements.

content.Placements: From our batch, about 50-60% of students were placed. Students were mostly placed in software companies because only 3 to 4 core companies visited our campus. Top recruiting companies are Triveni Turbines, Lemon VB, Dhoot Transmission, TCS, Infosys, Persistent, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was good but faculty members were very good in conducting practicals. My batch and the previous batch had made Go-kart in college workshops. So our college provided us enough infrastructure. We had labs and workshops. My branch was mechanical but it also had computer labs because we had subjects in programming.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

hostel_campus.college_name: Lokmanya Tilak Jankalyan Shikshan Sanstha's Priyadarshini Bhagwati College of Engineering Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Review of Lokmanya Tilak Jankalyan Shikshan Sanstha's Priyadarshini Bhagwati College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our college are excellent. The labs for hardware and software practices are well-maintained and clean. The quality of the hostel is quite good, and the mess is also provided by the hostel. The food quality provided by the hostel is healthy and tasty.

reviews.review_heading: College provides good infrastructure & well-designed labs, and the teaching staff is understandable.
reviews.review_text: Our Computer Science and Engineering department offers a library, high-speed internet connection, fully cleaned environment, and neat and clean classrooms. Mainly, the hostel provides various facilities, and the quality of food available in the mess and canteen is too good than we expected. Also, sports and medical facilities are available in our hostel.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our course and placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides the best infrastructure and facilities like free Wi-Fi, a library, labs, classrooms, a canteen, good and hygienic food, etc. The food served in the canteen has good value for money.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty members and facilities are excellent, with an outstanding environment.
reviews.review_text: This college has an excellent infrastructure with a library, computer labs, seminar halls, canteen, etc., with a well-maintained decorum. Overall, the infrastructure is the best, with greenery all around the campus. All around the campus, hygiene is maintained.

reviews.review_heading: The college was good in academics and extra curricular activities but average in placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was good but faculty members were very good in conducting practicals. My batch and the previous batch had made Go-kart in college workshops. So our college provided us enough infrastructure. We had labs and workshops. My branch was mechanical but it also had computer labs because we had subjects in programming.

reviews.review_heading: This is a good college so students can take admission in it.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available in this college. The classrooms facility is the most attractive, and laboratories are available for the practical. The library is big and most of the books are available in our college. Wi-Fi is available, and this college maintained discipline. The canteen is also available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with placements.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and practical rooms are amazing here. There is a huge space as well as a nice infrastructure for studies. But courts, grounds and library are not much good compared to other colleges. There is no discrimination, biasing, bullying and harassment throughout the year. Even there is a placement cell, career guidance cell, women cell and other cells which will help you financially as well as mentally if you face such problems.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is good, and faculty members are awesome.
reviews.review_text: There is a Wi-Fi hub in every branch. There are proper labs and neat and clean classrooms in our college. Our college also provides the hostel facility so that students who come from villages can stay there and complete their education. The library is equipped with everything, and it has a collection of books to provide knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: PBCOE is the best best place to enjoy and learn.
reviews.review_text: The placement rate of our college is high. In the current year, mostly 90%-95% of the students got placed in well known and reputed companies. The salary packages offered to the students are also worthy. Companies that visited our college are HCL, Wipro, Infosys, Global Logic and many more. Companies hire for not only final year students but also the second year, and third-year students get benefited for internships.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best place to learn inside the city.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides various facilities for students like Wi-Fi and computer laboratories. In the library, you will get books of every subject related to engineering as well as an MBA. The canteen is available in the college. The food quality is pretty good. Sports and games department is also available. Our college provides indoor and outdoor games for students and teachers.

reviews.review_heading: Our college campus is awesome to learn a lot.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a very good infrastructure like classrooms, library, labs and also the departmental libraries for quick reference. Wi-Fi facility is also available to the students, and we have a sports room for indoor games like table tennis, chess, carrom, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Lokmanya Tilak Jankalyan Shikshan Sanstha's Priyadarshini Bhagwati College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very appreciable and awesome. There are no Wi-Fi facilities in our college. Labs are well-maintained, and the classrooms and library are neat and clean. Facilities for sports and game are very poor.

reviews.review_heading: The college has a satisfying environment for studies. It provides good placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good and enough to provide the best facilities. Labs, classrooms and library are very well-functional and have enough resources to satisfy every students' need. There is no hostel inside the campus. Canteen food is decent.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college, and I am disappointed with it.
reviews.review_text: There are labs and classrooms in our college. There is no playing area in our college for sports. There are no hostel facilities in our college and also Wi-Fi facilities. Even our college provided elevator last year. The canteen is average here, and the food served in it is also average. However, the library is good.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college to pursue engineering.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Almost all the facilities are available here. There are good labs with good infrastructure. There is no need to worry about the infrastructure. Teachers are the most important assets of this college. They are good and very much helpful.
